Emojis

This page lists all supported emojis available via the embedded emoji CSS library.

Usage: :name: (e.g., :smile:)

EmojiShortcode
💯:100:
🔢:1234:
😄:smile:
😃:smiley:
😀:grinning:
😊:blush:
☺️:relaxed:
😉:wink:
😍:heart_eyes:
😘:kissing_heart:
😚:kissing_closed_eyes:
😗:kissing:
😙:kissing_smiling_eyes:
😜:stuck_out_tongue_winking_eye:
😝:stuck_out_tongue_closed_eyes:
😛:stuck_out_tongue:
😳:flushed:
😁:grin:
😔:pensive:
😌:relieved:
😒:unamused:
😞:disappointed:
😣:persevere:
😢:cry:
😂:joy:
😭:sob:
😪:sleepy:
😥:disappointed_relieved:
😰:cold_sweat:
😅:sweat_smile:
😓:sweat:
😩:weary:
😫:tired_face:
😨:fearful:
😱:scream:
😠:angry:
😡:rage:
😤:triumph:
😖:confounded:
😆:laughing:
😆:satisfied:
😋:yum:
😷:mask:

😴:sleeping:
